description: Pay seller for cached inference submitted to the exchange. Exchange buys the result at a discount. Amount must equal token_cost * discount_pct / 100 (integer division, truncate). Each put_msg can only be paid once (prevents double-pay). Operator must have sufficient balance. State effect: seller balance increases by amount, operator balance decreases by amount.

args.name: seller
args.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) of the seller.

args.name: amount
args.description: Scrip payment in micro-tokens. Must equal token_cost * discount_pct / 100.

args.name: token_cost
args.description: Original inference token cost in micro-tokens (seller's claim).

args.name: result_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hex of the cached inference result. Full sha256 hex is 64 characters; max_length 128 accounts for optional sha256: prefix and future hash formats.

args.name: put_msg
args.description: Message ID of the put operation being paid. Must reference a valid, unprocessed put from the seller.
